abilities.description: The disrupter can store up to 3 energy. When you charge it, roll +wits. On a strong hit, take +3 energy. On a weak hit, take +2. When you fire the disrupter's tether to sabotage a device or vehicle, roll +energy. Then, suffer -1 energy.
When you charge the disrupter, you may reroll your action die. When you make a move using this tool, take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you make a move using the disrupter to snare a machine or object, consider if the tool is charged with enough energy to carry the weight of the object (heavy=3; medium=2; light=1). If it does, roll +energy. Then, suffer -energy as per the weight.
When you make a move to inflict harm with the disrupter, reroll your action die if its value is less than the energy +2.

system.description: A device that fires an electromagnetic tether.
